description: Team Arcelor from JEC won 1st position in RoboRace, 2nd in RoboSoccer and 2nd in Pick n Place Challenge at Technovus 2025, the techno-management fest of JEC, held after a long hiatus of 6 years
Team ZenNos from JEC won the 3rd prize in Robo Race at Pyrokinesis 2025
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 2nd prize in Robo Soccer at Techxetra 2024
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 2nd prize in Robo Soccer and Robo War at AEI
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 1st prize in Robo Race at ABDU, Azara in Guwahati.
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 1st prize in Robo Soccer and 2nd prize in Robo Race.
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 1st prizes in the Droid Blitz and Embetronix events also managing to reach the final round of the Sand Rover event at IIT Kharagpur.
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 1st prize in Robo Race and 2nd prizes in the Robo Soccer and Robo War events at AEI
Team Arcelor from JEC won the 2nd prizes in the Robo Soccer and Robo Sumo events at RGU
Kaushik Bora, Simanta Samiran Deka and Bhairab Bharali participated in the WRC RC Craft Challenge at Technoxian World Robotics Championship 2023 held at Noida.
Mituraj Baishya, Miran Afraz Ullah, Ratnajeet Bhowal and Arnab Jyoti Singha secured 4th position in the Pick n Place Event at Techkriti 2023
15+ students participated and represented JEC at the national level at Kshitij 2023 at IIT Kharagpur. The students participated in the events Sand Rover, Robowars and Laws of Motion
Team New Era JEC secured 1st position in the Smart City Innovative Project at Technosis 2022
Manoranjan Sah and his team 'DIGANTA' won the Hardware Edition of NATIONAL MISSION for CLEAN GANGA (NMCG), Ministry of Jal Shakti, at SIH 2022.

location: Indira Gandhi Stadium Complex, New Delhi
description: First position in RC Craft competition in light category won by Ubedul Islam, Nayanjyoti Sarmah and Rahul Das from Team JecRoboworld
